summary: Dictionaries store key-value pairs with O(1) lookup. Keys must be hashable. Access safely with `.get()`.
oneLineSummary: Dictionaries provide fast O(1) key-value storage and preserve insertion order.

memoryTricks.trick: Key = Coat Check Ticket. Hand the ticket to get your exact coat instantly.

commonErrors.cause: Direct bracket access for missing key `d['bad']`
